name: Chicken and Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine 2 tablespoons water, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, and 1 tablespoon soy sauce. Add chicken and coat well. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup water, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, and sugar. Set aside.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet until very hot but not smoking. Add chicken. Stir-fry over high heat for 3 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add remaining 2 tablespoons oil. Add garlic and onion. Stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
5. Add celery and celery cabbage. Stir over medium heat for 5 minutes.
6. Add bean sprouts, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and mushrooms. Stir for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in chicken and spaghetti. Add the cornstarch mixture. Cook until chicken is heated through and sauce has thickened. Serve immediately.
